title: Border Flight
writer: Stuart Anthony, Arthur J. Beckhard, Ewing Scott
actors: Frances Farmer, John Howard, Roscoe Karns
plot: Border Flight is a 1936 American drama film directed by Otho Lovering and written by Stuart Anthony, Arthur J. Beckhard and Ewing Scott. The film stars Frances Farmer, John Howard, Roscoe Karns, Robert Cummings, Grant Withers and ...
